subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-09-02
subcodes.first_line: When His holiness Christ appeared the Jews said the same thing. They thought that after Moses no other divine man must appear in the world
subcodes.subjects: @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @rejection of Muhammad, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Seal of the Prophets, @Christian doctrine and practice
